creator: empty.japan
caption:
Each Goshuin is believed to be imbued with the power of the deity or spirit enshrined at the temple or shrine.
Getting a Goshuin isn’t just about collecting a stamp, it’s more like a ritual. You offer a small fee (usually around 300 to 500 yen) and your Goshuincho (special book meant only for collecting Goshuins) to the Temple’s attendant. They proceed to write your Goshuin with meticulous care, often accompanied by a short blessing or a prayer. One of the best things to bring home from your trip to Japan ❤️
